---
title: "Marketing Analysis"
author: "Isha Mantri"
format: 
  html: default
  pdf: default
 
execute: 
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
editor: visual
---

```{r}

#| include: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(lubridate)

```

```{r}


```
